title: phyllanthus collinus
intro: Phyllanthus collinus, also known as Sama or Indian gooseberry, is a type of small shrub native to Southeast Asia and India. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus collinus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, as well as in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
